Hero.title: Golf in the heart of the Bakony
Hero.subtitle: 9+9 hole golf course and footgolf course in the heart of the Bakony — accommodation through our partner Hotel Szarvaskút.

Inquiry.title: Request a tee time
Inquiry.subtitle: Tell us when you'd like to play and we'll call you back within 24 hours.
Inquiry.successText: We've received your enquiry. We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
Inquiry.demoNote: This is a concept demo — submissions are not stored.

Story.title: Where the Bakony meets the game
Story.p1: Forest Hills Golf Club sits near the town of Zirc, in the forested heart of the Bakony mountains. Each section of the 9+9 hole course has its own character — a tree-lined fairway here, an open plateau green there.
Story.p2: We favour an unhurried game. Call ahead, arrive early, and play at your own pace. Bring the family — the dedicated footgolf course is built for kids, friends, and corporate teams alike.

Pillars.title: Three experiences in one place
Pillars.golfText: Par-72, 18-hole course stretching 6,200 metres, with varied technical challenges. Driving range, putting green and chipping area available to warm up.
Pillars.footgolfText: Dedicated footgolf course for young players and teams — perfect for family afternoons and corporate events.
Pillars.stayText: Our partner Hotel Szarvaskút offers comfortable rooms and wellness facilities only minutes from the course, with package deals available for guests.

Gallery.title: Glimpses from the club
Gallery.alt1: Golf carts lined up in front of the clubhouse
Gallery.alt2: Bakony forest landscape — a ridge running into the fairway
Gallery.alt4: Fairway running to the green, forest in the distance
Gallery.alt5: Water hazard with a small fountain at its centre
Gallery.alt6: Open course section with the Bakony hills beyond

Meta.title: Forest Hills Golf Club — Zirc, Bakony
Meta.description: 18-hole golf course and footgolf facility in the Bakony hills, near Zirc, Hungary. Accommodation at our partner Hotel Szarvaskút. Family-friendly, open daily.
